survey_vars.name: public_image
survey_vars.title: Public Image
survey_vars.description: Whether the image URL is publicly accessible. If No, OCI credentials from the environment will be used to pull the image before deploying.

survey_vars.title: CPU Cores
survey_vars.description: Number of CPU cores to allocate

survey_vars.title: Network Interface
survey_vars.description: Network interface to use for the VM

survey_vars.description: Name of the VM to push as an image
